name: Meat and Cheese a la cart
steps: Pan dry the meat for 30 mins
Make it so so so so so so so so so so so so so so delicious
trainingText:
# Meat and Cheese a la cart

Category: DINNER
Serves: 1

## Description


## Ingredients
- Beef
- Cheese
- Sauce

## Steps
1. Purchase meat
2. Purchase cheese
3. Pan dry the meat for 30 mins
4. Add the cheese
5. Sear the cheese
6. Make it so so so so so so so so so so so so so so delicious
